lines.speaker: Alyx
lines.text: Bram... I've been watching you in battle. You never hesitate.

lines.speaker: Bram
lines.text: Ha. That's because I calculated every angle before we marched.

lines.speaker: Alyx
lines.text: You make it sound so cold.

lines.speaker: Bram
lines.text: Maybe. But it keeps you alive. And that...

lines.speaker: Bram
lines.text: ...matters to me more than I expected.
